description: Configure and run the Bologna Pasubio SUMO scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg) to compute vehicle emissions for all vehicles (device.emissions.probability = 1.0). Save the simulation statistics to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/statistics.xml and generate a plain-text report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/emissions_report.txt. The report must contain the total numeric values for the following labels on separate lines: CO2_mg, CO_mg, NOx_mg, PMx_mg, Fuel_mL, and Vehicle_Count.
